260:10890.name: A bold headline that grabs attention.
260:10890.characters:
OnePlan Travel is an all-in-one group travel app that helps you plan trips, manage shared expenses, save places from social videos, and keep everything organized in one place.

Planning a trip with friends should feel exciting, not messy. No more jumping between spreadsheets, notes, random links, and split-bill tools. With OnePlan Travel, your group can plan together more easily, stay aligned, and enjoy the trip with less stress.

siteSettings.title: Danny_xs
siteSettings.description:
🚀 UI/UX & Product Designer | Design Team Leader
With over 4 years of experience in UI/UX and Product Design, I have successfully contributed to and led 30+ projects across diverse industries, including IoT, real estate, Web3, and education. Notably, my work in Web3 has resulted in products attracting over 700,000 users within just one week, showcasing my ability to design impactful and user-centered digital experiences.
